creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text: Closing this with the release of Qt 6.8.2. devel/libqt6xdg and its consumers have been added to my list of ports to bump after Qt6 releases, to put it mildly. Hopefully, it will stop abusing the Qt private API someday since this is slightly inconvenient for me, probably even more so for its users and just bad practice.
